site.name: UCAISM Global Initiative
site.defaultTitle: UCAISM Global Initiative — Individual Sovereignty in the Age of AI
site.defaultDescription: UCAISM Global Initiative is an independent research and public-education initiative founded by Chang-Gyu Kwag, advancing individual sovereignty, fiduciary AI, open digital infrastructure, and Intelligent Capitalism.

pages.title: UCAISM Global Initiative — Individual Sovereignty in the Age of AI
pages.description: The official platform for UCAISM Global Initiative, Open Wins, Intelligent Capitalism, and the research agenda for individual sovereignty in the age of AI.
pages.keywords: UCAISM, individual sovereignty, AI governance, Intelligent Capitalism, Open Wins, Chang-Gyu Kwag

pages.title: Research Library — UCAISM Global Initiative
pages.description: Browse UCAISM books, foundation papers, policy briefs, working papers, and media resources in one global research library.
pages.keywords: UCAISM research library, AI governance research, policy briefs, working papers, foundation papers

pages.title: Foundation Papers — UCAISM Global Initiative
pages.description: Core UCAISM foundation papers on the sovereignty gap, fiduciary AI, platform power, open rails, and Intelligent Capitalism.

pages.title: Policy Briefs — UCAISM Global Initiative
pages.description: Concise UCAISM policy briefs translating research into institutional guidance for AI governance, platform reform, data sovereignty, and digital public infrastructure.
pages.keywords: UCAISM policy briefs, AI governance, platform reform, data sovereignty, digital public infrastructure

pages.title: Working Papers — UCAISM Global Initiative
